REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (627 San Bruno Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94107)
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for San Francisco Public Administrator's Office, Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,215,00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.
